narrative:
Broadview Heights-02-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 992 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.8 percentage points.
